title: thymus maroccanus var. rhombicus
intro: Thymus maroccanus var. rhombicus, also known as North African thyme, is a subspecies of the thyme plant native to the Mediterranean region. This perennial herb is known for its medicinal properties, which include antimicrobial and antiseptic properties, making it effective in treating wounds, skin conditions, and respiratory issues. The health benefits of North African thyme include reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and supporting the immune system. The plant can be used in herbal preparations such as teas, essential oils, and infusions, which can be consumed orally or applied topically to promote overall well-being.
